text:
is an artbook by Mahiro Maeda, it was edited by Mahiro Maeda in cooperation with khara inc., Tōru Nozaki and Anime Tokusatsu Archive Organization (ATAC). It was published by Kobunsha on 28 February 2025. https://www.eva-info.jp/21807 

Overview

Announced on 17 May 2024, an artbook covering the career of Mahiro Maeda including unpublished works, in the format A4 size (282mm x 220mm) with 240 pages in full color. It was delayed to 28 February 2025. A regular edition was offered for 6,600 yen (including tax) and a special edition in B4 format (306mm x 257mm) for 19,800 yen (including tax). https://x.com/khara_inc/status/1847114408830685638
